figures.caption: Fig. 2. Payoff function of player one is drawn in a dot-dashed line and payoff function of player two is drawn in a thick solid line. In this case, c = 2, λ1 = 1 and λ2 = 3. The switch points of s1 are marked by three vertical red dashed lines. Function values p1,I(v∗2), p2,I(v∗2) and p1,F(t1,3) are marked by horizontal blue dotted lines.

Fig. 1. Payoff function of player one is drawn in a dot-dashed line and payoff function of player two is drawn in a thick solid line. In this case, c = 2, λ1 = 1 and λ2 = 2. In this case, s1 and s2 are AIF functions with a common switch point at v∗2 = 1.17062. This switch point is marked by a red vertical dashed line. Function values p1,I(v∗2) and p2,I(v∗2) are marked by horizontal blue dotted lines. They denote record highs of payoff functions p1(v) and p2(v).
Fig. 3. Chattering strategy η(v). The identity strategy function is shown in red dotted line.
